description.from: Add dashboard support for model performance frontier procedure results so procedure detail displays cost-vs-accuracy points and Pareto frontier status from procedure state, alongside compact artifact metadata.
description.to:
Add dashboard support for model performance frontier procedure results so procedure detail displays cost-vs-accuracy points and Pareto frontier status from procedure state, alongside compact artifact metadata.

Feature: Model performance frontier dashboard display
  Scenario: Procedure detail displays frontier chart
    Given a model performance frontier procedure has completed with frontier rows in procedure state
    When a user opens the procedure detail view
    Then the UI displays a cost-vs-accuracy chart with one point per variant
    And Pareto frontier variants are visually distinguished
    And artifact metadata remains compact instead of rendering the full report inline

  Scenario: Procedure state is populated for dashboard rendering
    Given frontier evaluation rows are finalized
    When the procedure completes
    Then procedure state includes score identity, champion version, rows, frontier rows, and report output metadata
